## Checklist

- [ ] The change is focused and follows the repository's contribution guide.
- [ ] Relevant tests and checks pass.
- [ ] Documentation is updated where needed.
- [ ] No credentials, personal data, or production secrets are included.
- [ ] Security impact and backward compatibility were considered.
